LongParameterList:UserPreferencesDao.kt$UserPreferencesDao$( id: UUID, userId: String?, notificationEnabled: Boolean, defaultReminderTime: String, theme: String, energyTrackingEnabled: Boolean, notificationChannels: String?, quietHoursEnabled: Boolean, quietHoursStart: LocalTime, quietHoursEnd: LocalTime, updatedAt: Long )
MaxLineLength:AdminFirestoreMapper.kt$// Sealed-class tag conversions (mirrors the tag values in sync/FirestoreMapper.kt but uses Admin SDK types and permissive defaults)
MaxLineLength:GetPendingRecoveriesUseCase.kt$GetPendingRecoveriesUseCase$"Failed to load habit ${session.habitId} for recovery session ${session.id}: ${habitResult.message}"
MaxLineLength:KairosWidgetContent.kt$// Glance lacks percentage-based widths; 200dp approximates a 3-column widget. Resizing may cause overflow.
MaxLineLength:Main.kt$"Failed to initialize Firebase Admin SDK with service account at '${config.firebaseServiceAccountPath}': ${e.message}"
MaxLineLength:UserPreferencesDao.kt$UserPreferencesDao$"UPDATE user_preferences SET notification_enabled = :notificationEnabled, updated_at = :updatedAt WHERE id = :id"
MaxLineLength:UserPreferencesDao.kt$UserPreferencesDao$"UPDATE user_preferences SET quiet_hours_enabled = :enabled, quiet_hours_start = :start, quiet_hours_end = :end WHERE id = :id"

TopLevelPropertyNaming:AuthSession.kt$/** Time-to-live for pending QR auth sessions, in seconds. */ const val SESSION_TTL_SECONDS = 120L
TopLevelPropertyNaming:KairosWidgetContent.kt$/** Maximum number of habits displayed in the widget list. */ internal const val MAX_WIDGET_HABITS = 5
